description: Perform a general geometric transformation on points of blocks. If < range > is not specified all blocks are transformed.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: reflect-plane
keywords.description: Make a reflection transformation about a plane. Specify the mirror plane defined by dip angle f1 and dip direction f2 . Angles are defined in degrees. Specify the mirror plane defined by three points v_1 v_2 v_3 .

keywords.name: rotate
keywords.description: Perform a rotation by angle f , in degrees, using rotation axes that go through the coordinate origin in the direction v .

keywords.name: scale
keywords.description: Scale the point positions by expanding or contracting their distance from the origin by a factor of v in the \(x\) -, \(y\) -, and \(z\) -directions, respectively.

keywords.name: translate
keywords.description: Perform a translation — adding v to each coordinate point of the blocks to be transformed.
